mapper.select: SELECT distinct tag_name FROM tag t JOIN feed_tag ft ON t.tag_id = ft.tag_id ORDER BY t.tag_id
select t.tag_name from feed_tag ft join tag t on ft.tag_id = t.tag_id where ft.feed_id = #{feedId} order by t.tag_id asc
select t.tag_name from tag t group by tag_name order by count(*) desc LIMIT 10

SELECT f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, f.reply_cnt,
m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color, m.birthday,
mp.saved_name AS profileImage, mp.file_path AS profilePath,
COUNT(DISTINCT fl_all.like_id) AS likeCnt,
CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT fl_me.like_id) = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS liked
FROM feed f
JOIN member m ON f.username = m.username
LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON f.username = mp.username
JOIN feed_tag ft ON f.feed_id = ft.feed_id
JOIN tag t ON ft.tag_id = t.tag_id
LEFT JOIN feed_like fl_all ON f.feed_id = fl_all.feed_id
LEFT JOIN feed_like fl_me ON f.feed_id = fl_me.feed_id
WHERE f.deleted = 0 AND t.tag_name = #{tagName}
GROUP BY f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, f.deleted, f.reply_cnt,
m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color, m.birthday,
mp.saved_name, mp.file_path
ORDER BY f.feed_id DESC
